meta.title: Carmen Ramírez — Fitness & Nutrition
meta.description: Personalised online training and nutrition for women who want real, lasting change — no crash diets, no shame, no starting over every Monday.

hero.lead: Personalised training and nutrition for women who want real change — no crash diets, no shame, no starting over every Monday.

forwhom.title: WHO IS THIS PROGRAM FOR?
forwhom.lead: This program is for you if:
items: You feel bloated or have digestive issues
You have a complicated relationship with food
You want to take care of yourself without obsessing
You've been training but don't see results
forwhom.closing: Your training level doesn't matter. Everything adapts to you and your body.

program.title: THE PROGRAM
program.lead: Three pillars that adapt to your life — not the other way around.

training.title: Training
training.body: A progressive plan tailored to you — at home with basic gear, in the gym, or with just your bodyweight.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.body: Flexible guidelines and creative recipes ready in under 15 minutes. No hunger, no guilt, no extremes.

coaching.title: Coaching
coaching.body: Close support via WhatsApp and monthly video check-ins. You're never on your own.

training.title: TRAINING
training.p1: We design a progressive plan made for you — from your first week to the moment lifting one more plate feels easy.
training.p2: It works at home with basic equipment or in the gym. Every block is designed for results without spending hours training.

nutrition.title: NUTRITION
nutrition.p1: With me, you won't feel like you're on a diet.
nutrition.p2: I work with flexible guidelines and creative, fast recipes so you can eat well even when time is tight. Most are ready in under 15 minutes.
nutrition.p3: We also address inflammation, digestive issues, SIBO and difficult relationships with food — always from a respectful, non-extreme place.
recipes: Whole-wheat chicken fajitas with yogurt sauce
Zucchini lasagna with beef and light ricotta
Lettuce tacos with sautéed shrimp and mango

coaching.title: COACHING & SUPPORT
coaching.p1: You're not alone in this process.
coaching.p2: We start with an initial video call to get to know you well.
coaching.p3: We stay in close contact on WhatsApp and meet monthly on video to adjust whatever needs adjusting.
coaching.p4: My goal is for you to enjoy the process, build the habit, and keep it as a lifestyle — not a sprint.

testimonials.title: RESULTS
testimonials.note: Every process is individual. Results depend on consistency and each person's starting point.

items.name: Laura, 34
items.quote: I got my energy back, and more importantly, a calm relationship with food. I don't obsess over the scale anymore.

items.name: María, 42
items.quote: What I value most is the follow-up. Carmen is there when I need her — no pressure, just clarity.

items.name: Ana, 47
items.quote: After years of trying diets, I finally have a plan that adapts to my life — not the other way around.

instagram.title: ON INSTAGRAM
instagram.lead: Recipes, workouts and real day-to-day routines.

items.a: I recommend a minimum of 3 months to see sustainable change, but the plan renews month to month. You decide how long you want support.
No. The plan adapts to whatever you have: a full gym, basic gear at home (dumbbells or bands), or just your bodyweight.

items.q: What if I have allergies or food restrictions?
items.a: The nutrition plan adapts to allergies, intolerances, vegetarian or vegan diets, and any condition we discuss in the initial call.

items.q: Is it online or in person?
items.a: It's 100% online. We work via WhatsApp and video calls, which lets me support you wherever you are.

items.q: What happens after I fill out the form?
items.a: I receive your application and reply within 24h to schedule the initial call — no commitment required.

items.q: Is there a guarantee or refund?
items.a: Yes. If in the first two weeks you feel the program isn't for you, I refund the full amount.

ctaFinal.title: READY TO START?
ctaFinal.lead: Fill out the form and I'll get back to you in under 24h. Limited spots each month to keep coaching close and personal.
